headline: Copart, Inc. to Release Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results
summary: DALLAS, May 13, 2026--Copart, Inc. (NASDAQ: CPRT) announced today that it will release earnings for the third quarter of fiscal 2026 after 4:00 p.m. Eastern Time (3:00 p.m. Central) on Thursday, May 21, 2026.
